text: With the College of Contract Management, they offer several courses that provide similar education as bsc or bsc hons.what does bsc hons mean? Bachelor of science with honors. It is a more intense study of the field of one’s specialization. The institute specializes in online learning and is very flexible with time so if you happen to learn with them, their studies will fit your day to day schedule to avoid disrupting your current lifestyle. https://www.theccm.co.uk/bsc-hons/
